meta.title: Fly Infinity Token - FAQ
meta.description: Frequently Asked Questions about Fly Infinity Token

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How much does it cost to buy Fly Infinity ownership shares?
faq.a1p1: To purchase Fly Infinity ownership shares, you need to have the following in your wallet:
faq.a1li1: 100 DAI — for the ownership share purchase
faq.a1li2: Approximately $1 worth of BNB — for network gas fees
faq.a1info: 💡 Important: Make sure you have enough BNB in your wallet to cover transaction fees on the BNB Smart Chain network.
faq.a1p2: Once you have these amounts, follow the steps in the DApp to complete your ownership share purchase.
faq.q2: How do I buy ownership shares?
faq.a2p1: To purchase Fly Infinity ownership shares, follow these steps:
faq.a2step2text: Connect your wallet (MetaMask, TrustWallet, or TokenPocket).
faq.a2step3text: First, approve 100 DAI for the network contract.
faq.a2step5text: Enter your referrer address and complete registration as a network owner.
faq.a2p2: After registration, you will be recognized as an official owner of the Fly Infinity network and can enjoy all its benefits.
faq.a2info: 💡 Note: You must have at least 100 DAI in your wallet to purchase ownership shares.
faq.q3: How do I buy FIT tokens?
faq.a3p1: To purchase FIT tokens, you must first buy Fly Infinity ownership shares, then follow these steps:
faq.a3step1text: After registering as an owner, return to the DApp page.
faq.a3step2text: Approve 1000 DAI for the token contract.
faq.a3step3text: Enter the amount of DAI you want to spend.
faq.a3step4text: Click the Buy FIT button and confirm the transaction in your wallet.
faq.a3p2: After confirmation, the equivalent FIT will be sent to your wallet.
faq.a3info: 💡 Important: You can only buy FIT after purchasing ownership shares.
faq.q4: How do I sell FIT tokens?
faq.a4p1: To sell FIT tokens, follow these steps:
faq.a4step3text: Enter the amount of FIT you want to sell.
faq.a4step5text: Confirm the transaction in your wallet.
faq.a4p2: After confirmation, the equivalent DAI will be sent to your wallet.
faq.a4info: 💡 Note: Every FIT sale adds a portion of the fee to the DAI reserve, increasing the base token price.
faq.q5: Can I transfer tokens between wallets?
faq.a5p1: No — FIT tokens cannot be transferred between wallets.
faq.a5p2: This restriction is designed for the following reasons:
faq.a5li1: ✅ Maintain the constantly rising (non-diminishing) price algorithm — Token transfers could create price volatility and a black market.
faq.a5li2: ✅ Prevent black market creation — All FIT trades must go through the smart contract to ensure transparency and security.
faq.a5li3: ✅ Full transparency — All transactions are visible and auditable on the blockchain.
faq.a5info: 💡 Conclusion: You can only trade FIT through the smart contract. FIT is non-transferable between wallets.
faq.a5p3: The only way to change ownership is to sell through the contract and have someone else buy.
faq.q6: What are the buy and sell fees?
faq.a6p1: Transaction fees in Fly Infinity Token are as follows:
faq.a6li1: Buying FIT: 3% of the input amount
faq.a6li2: Selling FIT: 6% of the output amount
faq.a6p2: These fees are automatically added to the DAI reserve, which increases the base token price.
faq.a6info: 💡 Key Point: The more transactions occur, the faster the FIT base price grows. This means every buy and sell increases the value of your tokens.
faq.a6note: 📊 All fees are transparent and viewable on the smart contract.
faq.a7p1: Yes, but with one important condition:
faq.a7warning: ⚠️ You must sell all your FIT before changing your wallet!
faq.a7p2: If you change your wallet without selling first, your tokens will become inaccessible and you will lose the ability to sell them.
faq.a7step1: First, sell all your FIT tokens.
faq.a7step3: Buy FIT again in your new wallet.
faq.a7info: 💡 Reason: FIT is non-transferable between wallets, so selling and repurchasing is the only way to change ownership.
faq.q8: What if I lose my recovery phrase?
faq.a8p1: Unfortunately, if you lose your recovery phrase (Seed Phrase / Recovery Phrase), there is no way to recover your wallet.
faq.a8p2: The recovery phrase is the only way to access your wallet, and:
faq.a8li3: ❌ No support team can recover it
faq.a8li4: ❌ No one else has access to it
faq.a8sec1: Write your recovery phrase on paper and store it in a safe place.
faq.a8sec2: Keep multiple copies in separate secure locations.
faq.a8sec3: Never store it digitally (screenshots, cloud, email).
faq.a8warning: ⚠️ Warning: No support team, including the Fly Infinity team, will ever ask for your recovery phrase. Beware of scammers!

footer.tagline: Fly Infinity — Decentralized. Transparent. Forever Rising.
